task: Find the address and phone of the Office of the Inspector General (OIG).
final_result_response:
Based on my research on the Department of Justice website (justice.gov → oig.justice.gov), here is the contact information for the **Office of the Inspector General (OIG)**:

**Address:**
U.S. Department of Justice
Office of the Inspector General
950 Pennsylvania Avenue NW
Washington, D.C. 20530

**Phone:** (202) 514-3435
**Fax:** (202) 353-0472

This information was found on the OIG's official Office Directory page at oig.justice.gov/about/directory, under the "Headquarters" section.
